로마서 12:1.content: Therefore I urge you, brothers, by the mercies of God, to present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable to God, which is your spiritual service.

로마서 12:2.content: Don’t be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind, so that you may prove what is the good, well-pleasing, and perfect will of God.

로마서 12:3.content: For I say through the grace that was given me, to every man who is among you, not to think of himself more highly than he ought to think; but to think reasonably, as God has apportioned to each person a measure of faith.

로마서 12:4.content: For even as we have many members in one body, and all the members don’t have the same function,

로마서 12:5.content: so we, who are many, are one body in Christ, and individually members of one another,

로마서 12:6.content: having gifts differing according to the grace that was given to us: if prophecy, let’s prophesy according to the proportion of our faith;

로마서 12:7.content: or service, let’s give ourselves to service; or he who teaches, to his teaching;

로마서 12:8.content: or he who exhorts, to his exhorting; he who gives, let him do it with generosity; he who rules, with diligence; he who shows mercy, with cheerfulness.

로마서 12:9.content: Let love be without hypocrisy. Abhor that which is evil. Cling to that which is good.

로마서 12:10.content: In love of the brothers be tenderly affectionate to one another; in honor preferring one another;

로마서 12:11.content: not lagging in diligence; fervent in spirit; serving the Lord;

로마서 12:12.content: rejoicing in hope; enduring in troubles; continuing steadfastly in prayer;

로마서 12:13.content: contributing to the needs of the saints; given to hospitality.

로마서 12:14.content: Bless those who persecute you; bless, and don’t curse.

로마서 12:15.content: Rejoice with those who rejoice. Weep with those who weep.

로마서 12:16.content: Be of the same mind one toward another. Don’t set your mind on high things, but associate with the humble. Don’t be wise in your own conceits.

로마서 12:17.content: Repay no one evil for evil. Respect what is honorable in the sight of all men.

로마서 12:18.content: If it is possible, as much as it is up to you, be at peace with all men.

로마서 12:19.content: Don’t seek revenge yourselves, beloved, but give place to God’s wrath. For it is written, “Vengeance belongs to me; I will repay, says the Lord.”

로마서 12:20.content: Therefore “If your enemy is hungry, feed him. If he is thirsty, give him a drink; for in doing so, you will heap coals of fire on his head.”

로마서 12:21.content: Don’t be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
